_source: Kurczak & Fish, Art & Science of Vedic Astrology Vol II, Ch.10 'Introduction to Lajjitaadi Avashtas' + the Jagradaadi avashtas.
_note: The 'live condition' engine — Velea's canonical backing for the LAW that planets are not fixed benefic/malefic but judged by their live state (see memory velea-planet-philosophy-no-black-and-white). A planet's ability to DELIVER what it signifies depends on the company it keeps. Two layers: (1) Lajjitaadi = WHICH emotional state a planet is in (shamed/proud/starved/thirsty/delighted/agitated), computed from conjunction/aspect/sign vs its friends & enemies; (2) Jagradaadi = HOW STRONGLY that state bites, from the planet's own dignity (awake/sleepy/asleep). Requires planetary-friendships.json.

lajjitaadi._desc: The six emotional states. Formulas are deterministic (need the friendship table + dignity). A planet may hold more than one state at once.

formula: A planet in the 5th house conjunct Sun, Saturn or Mars (must be the 5th house specifically)
OR a planet conjunct Rahu or Ketu AND conjunct Sun, Saturn or Mars (any house)
states.meaning: Shame, a stigma of failure; expectations that outrun reality, then the let-down. The 5th (mind/optimism) or a node inflates the expectation.

formula: A planet in its exaltation sign or moolatrikona
states.meaning: Confident, dignified, able to deliver its significations fully and with pride.

formula: A planet in an enemy's sign
states.meaning: Deprived, under-resourced, thwarted — cannot get what it needs to produce its significations; lack, want, difficulty.

formula: A planet aspected by an enemy AND not influenced by any auspicious planet AND in a water sign (Cancer, Scorpio, Pisces)
states.meaning: Emotionally unquenched, longing, dissatisfied; craving fulfilment it cannot reach.

formula: A planet in a friend's sign
OR aspected by a natural friend
states.meaning: Happy, supported, at ease — free to express its nature and deliver its significations with grace.

formula: OR aspected by an enemy that is ALSO a cruel planet (Mars, Saturn, Sun, or waning Moon)
states.meaning: Restless, frustrated, pushed off its natural rhythm; forced to act against its will, then destabilized.

jagradaadi._desc: The strength qualifier — how much a Lajjitaadi state actually bites, set by the planet's own DIGNITY. Awake = full force, sleepy = half, asleep = little/none. Apply to BOTH the afflicting planet (how hard it hurts) and the afflicted (how much it can bear).

states.formula: Planet in exaltation, moolatrikona, or own sign.
Planet in a natural friend's or neutral's sign.
Planet in a natural enemy's or debilitation sign.

notes: A planet can be jagrat in one varga and sushupti in another (dignity differs per divisional chart) — awake for one area of life, asleep for another.
Why all-exalted is not ideal: an exalted (awake) Sun is great, but exalted+awake Venus and Saturn (its enemies) starving it can still cause grief.
Why a debilitated planet may not act debilitated: if its enemies are asleep (sushupti) or absent and only friends cause avashtas, an asleep planet still functions with its friends' help.

combinationLogic._desc: How avashtas + house-lordship read together — the bridge from live condition to lived outcome, and to TIMING.
combinationLogic.houseLordCapacity: A house lord that is awake (jagrat) has full capacity to produce that house's affairs; sleepy = half; asleep = cannot alone.
combinationLogic.helpedOrHurt: Overlay the lajjitaadi state: awake house-lord + only positive (mudita/garvita) avashtas → that area of life runs clean; awake but starved/agitated by awake enemies → that area suffers; asleep house-lord + only positive avashtas → uplifted by the helping planets; asleep + awake negative avashtas → severely hampered.
combinationLogic.timingHook: The suffering/uplift FIRES during the sub-periods (bhukti/antara) of the offending or supporting planets, and during their TRANSITS over the natal position of the house lord. This is the deterministic knot-timing bridge: an afflicted marriage/career lord's difficulty surfaces in the dasha and transit of the planet afflicting it.

planetSignifications_avasthaList._note: The chapter's own broader signification list (extends karakas.json with body/tissue + a few extras). Jupiter = the husband; Venus = the wife (apply the non-heteronormative partner rule — see karakas.json _partnerKarakaRule). Rahu notably = fame here.
planetSignifications_avasthaList.Sun: father, authority figures, bones, the body, one's kingdom, government, status/power
planetSignifications_avasthaList.Moon: individuality, music, blood, inner satisfaction, the mother, popularity, dreams, bodily growth
planetSignifications_avasthaList.Mars: character, gold & gems, siblings, nervous system, neighbors, weapons, overseers, enemies' actions, surgery, logic
planetSignifications_avasthaList.Mercury: communication, skin, cognition, travel, discernment, games, relatives, craftsmanship, mantra, commerce, corporations, learning
planetSignifications_avasthaList.Jupiter: wealth, children, happiness, the bigger picture, the brain, adipose tissue, the husband, guru, banks, teachers, scripture, education, charity
planetSignifications_avasthaList.Venus: recuperation, DNA, muscles, genetics, jewelry, art, entertainment, massage, romance, pools, students, fulfilling decisions, conjugal bond, the wife, women, vehicles, diplomacy
planetSignifications_avasthaList.Saturn: elder siblings, prison, longevity, connective tissue, immune system, pets, servants, hard work, debts, loss, illness, duty, weaknesses, focus, perseverance
planetSignifications_avasthaList.Rahu: drugs, poison, confusion, foreign places & things, deception, technology, snakes, fame
planetSignifications_avasthaList.Ketu: bacteria, plagues, liberation of consciousness, mathematics, minute detail, what we bring from past lives

_pending: Per-planet detailed avastha narratives (e.g. 'Mars shaming the Sun', 'Saturn shaming the Sun', each planet × each state, ~1800 lines in Vol II Ch.10) NOT transcribed — the formulas above let the engine COMPUTE the state; feed the state + a short gloss to the narrative. Deep per-pair prose can be pulled on demand from both-books.txt Ch.10 if a surface needs it.
